description: TypeScript/JavaScript quality hooks for auto-linting, type-checking, and test running

hooks.command: FILE_PATH=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$FILE_PATH" ] && exit 0; case "$FILE_PATH" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) d=$(dirname "$FILE_PATH"); while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$d/package.json" ]; do d=$(dirname "$d"); done; [ -f "$d/package.json" ] && { cd "$d" && npx eslint --fix "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; };; esac

FILE_PATH=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$FILE_PATH" ] && exit 0; case "$FILE_PATH" in *.ts|*.tsx) d=$(dirname "$FILE_PATH"); while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$d/tsconfig.json" ]; do d=$(dirname "$d"); done; [ -f "$d/tsconfig.json" ] && { cd "$d" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20 || true; };; esac

FILE_PATH=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$FILE_PATH" ] && exit 0; case "$FILE_PATH" in *__tests__*|*.test.*|*.spec.*) exit 0;; *.ts|*.tsx) d=$(dirname "$FILE_PATH"); b=$(basename "$FILE_PATH" | sed 's/\.[^.]*$//'); for ext in test.ts test.tsx spec.ts spec.tsx; do for td in "$d/__tests__" "$d"; do t="$td/$b.$ext"; if [ -f "$t" ]; then root="$FILE_PATH"; while [ "$root" != "/" ]; do root=$(dirname "$root"); [ -f "$root/package.json" ] && break; done; [ -f "$root/package.json" ] && { cd "$root" && npx jest --no-coverage --bail "$t" 2>&1 | tail -10 || true; }; exit 0; fi; done; done;; esac
